title: galium fruticosum subsp. ephedroides
intro: Galium fruticosum subsp. ephedroides, a lesser-known subspecies of the Galium fruticosum plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Galium fruticosum subsp. ephedroides include relieving bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
